title: Nanoclaw AI Assistant
description: Autonomous personal AI assistant powered by Claude. Supports WhatsApp, Telegram, and HTTP API. Runs in isolated containers with persistent memory.

input.name: Anthropic API Key
input.description: Your Anthropic API key for Claude access

input.name: Assistant Name
input.description: Trigger word to address the assistant (e.g. 'Andy')

input.name: Telegram Bot Token
input.description: Token from @BotFather for Telegram channel support. Leave empty to disable.

input.name: Agent Timeout (ms)
input.description: Max runtime for agent sub-containers in milliseconds

input.name: Agent Container Image
input.description: Docker image used for spawning agent sub-containers
